steps.action: Navigate to /dashboard/demo-profile, open Settings, and click Export in Export Profile row
steps.expected: Export Profile modal opens from dashboard sidebar context
steps.observed: Export Profile modal opened with Export Password and Confirm Password fields.

steps.action: Enter matching passwords and submit Export
steps.observed: Backup Ready modal opened with Copy/Download and Done actions.
Modal closed and final URL remained http://127.0.0.1:5173/dashboard/demo-profile.

evidence.network: Dashboard document/asset navigation only; no API/XHR calls observed in this flow.

steps.action: From /dashboard/demo-profile open Settings and click Clear
steps.observed: Clear Credentials modal opened with Cancel and Clear Credentials actions.

steps.expected: Navigate to / with Welcome no-profiles variant
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/ and hero text 'Split your Nostr key. Sign from anywhere.' was visible (no-profiles variant).

evidence.network: Route transition to / after confirmation; no API/XHR calls observed.

steps.action: From /dashboard/demo-profile open Settings and click Lock
steps.expected: Navigate to / with returning Welcome variant
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/ and returning copy 'Welcome back.' was visible.

evidence.network: Route transition to / after lock; no API/XHR calls observed.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only Vite debug/info logs observed, no console.error or pageerror)
evidence.network: Three direct route navigations all resolved to root route /.

steps.action: Open /demo/dashboard-running and inspect running status card inline actions
steps.expected: Only Stop Signer inline CTA; no Lock in running status card
steps.observed: Inline action container class 'inline-actions' contained only 'Stop Signer'; lock CTA absent.

steps.expected: Subjects and TTLs match: kind:1 Short Text Note (42s), NIP-44 key exchange (1m 12s), kind:4 Encrypted DM (3m 05s)
steps.observed: All three rows matched expected subject strings and TTLs exactly.

steps.expected: Relays ordered primal/damus/nos.lol; Settings header uses Share Tech Mono; peer rows expose ellipsis + play-triangle actions
steps.observed: Relay order matched; .settings-title computed fontFamily was '"Share Tech Mono", system-ui, sans-serif'; peer action labels included Peer #0/#1/#2 actions and Open peer #0/#1/#2.

steps.action: Open /demo/dashboard-running, toggle Policies and inspect active button styles
steps.expected: Policies button active highlight (blue) while Recover/Export remain inactive gray
steps.observed: Policies button color/stroke resolved to rgb(147, 197, 253) with aria-pressed=true; Recover/Export remained rgb(209, 213, 219).

evidence.consoleErrors: none (no console.error or pageerror; only Vite debug/info logs)
evidence.network: Demo route navigations only; no API/XHR requests observed during checks.

frictions.description: agent-browser eval with heredoc plus trailing shell chaining caused a one-off shell parse error while setting up the unlock step.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran setup as separate commands (open/snapshot/click/wait) and continued successfully.

summary: Tested 5 assigned browser assertions (VAL-CROSS-011/012/013/014 and VAL-DSH-101) in session f885e149dacc__g6; all 5 passed with screenshots and structured evidence artifacts captured.
